CREATE TABLE polygons (id UInt32, geom String);
SELECT toTypeName(readWKTMultiPolygon(geom)) AS type FROM polygons;
SELECT readWKTMultiPolygon('MULTIPOLYGON(((0 0,4 0,4 4,0 4,0 0)))') AS output FORMAT Markdown;
SELECT id, readWKTMultiPolygon(geom) AS output FROM polygons WHERE id = 1;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM polygons) AS poly_count SELECT poly_count, readWKTMultiPolygon('MULTIPOLYGON(((0 0,0 10,10 10,10 0,0 0)))') AS output;
SELECT p.id, readWKTMultiPolygon(p.geom) AS multioutput FROM polygons AS p JOIN (SELECT 1 AS id) AS sub ON p.id = sub.id;
SELECT readWKTMultiPolygon(CONCAT('MULTIPOLYGON(((', toString(2), ' ', toString(2), ',', toString(5), ' ', toString(5), ')))')) AS output;
CREATE TABLE complex_polygons (id UInt32, geom String, properties String);
SELECT id, readWKTMultiPolygon(geom) FROM complex_polygons WHERE properties = 'simple';
SELECT readWKTMultiPolygon('MULTIPOLYGON(((3 3,8 3,8 8,3 8,3 3)))'), id FROM complex_polygons WHERE id = 2;
WITH (SELECT readWKTMultiPolygon('MULTIPOLYGON(((0 0,5 0,5 5,0 5,0 0)))')) AS example_poly SELECT toTypeName(example_poly) AS type;
SELECT *, readWKTMultiPolygon(geom) FROM (SELECT geom FROM polygons WHERE id = 1) AS sub_query;
